artifacts.summary: 4-phase implementation plan for module keyword migration of 155 Logics/ files with private def removal and build verification

memory_candidates.content: In Lean 4.31.0-rc1, private theorem works inside @[expose] public section in module files, but private def, private noncomputable def, and private abbrev do NOT. When migrating files to use the module keyword with @[expose] public section, only private def-like declarations need private removed; private theorem declarations are safe to keep. This asymmetry is likely because Prop-typed declarations receive special treatment in the module visibility system.
